case_title: LEONOUDAKIS, KRISTINA et al VS LUXOR CABS COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,896.93 FILED BY LEONOUDAKIS, KRISTINA BLEY, VERA AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CABS COMPANY MONTENEGRO, ALEX M. HICKS, HELEN  (OWNER) ALUODAH, TAMIR H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
